message:
feat(tui): universal detail pane scrolling for ALL modes

Replace 3 mode-specific scroll offsets (main, graph, board) with a
single universal detail_scroll_offset that works in EVERY mode when
focus is Detail. Ctrl+j/k (3-line) and Ctrl+d/u (page) now work in:
Main, Graph, History, Insights, Actionable, Attention, Tree,
LabelDashboard, FlowMatrix, TimeTravelDiff, Sprint.

Board retains its own scroll offset for its separate render path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
